results.title: AMD Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026 $AMD
DA Davidson analyst resets AMD stock price target for 2026 - TheStreet
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Forecast & Price Targets
AMD to $380? Analysts Raise 2026 Price Targets for the Chip Giant
Stifel resets AMD price target for rest of 2026 - TheStreet

summary: Consensus avg price target ~$290-$297 across ~34-54 analysts. Bull/bear range: $120 low to $375 high. Median ~$290.50 (54 analysts). Moderate Buy consensus: 19 buy, 9 hold, 0 sell. Recent outlier upgrades pushed average up; DA Davidson $375 and Susquehanna $375 are the current high-end targets.
